title: tephroseris tundricola
intro: Tephroseris tundricola, also known as Arctic tephroseris, is a perennial plant species native to the Arctic tundra regions of Russia and other parts of the world. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Tephroseris tundricola include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal remedies by drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
